title: Broad SMA Cross Confirmation
hypothesis: A slower SMA-cross confirmation branch can keep the absolute-trend thesis alive without repeating the fast reentry profile that already retired.
why_different_from_retired: The retired SMA-cross branch used a faster 20/100 crossover with a looser reentry threshold, while this branch slows confirmation to 50/150 with a higher signal bar and fewer names.
This branch also adds a sector cap and longer holding cadence so the evidence tests whether slower trend persistence, not fast reentry, is the better way to use the repo's SMA-cross engine.
success_criteria: The confirmation seed must pass the existing validation, holdout, and walk-forward promotion policy without exceptions before it can move toward paper-trade preparation.
If it fails, it must still produce enough evidence to either retire slower SMA-cross confirmation or justify a later family-generation workflow with explicit operator approval.

stop_conditions.when: The confirmation seed passes validation, holdout, and walk-forward promotion rules under the current policy.
The seed records a terminal promotion decision and still fails the policy, especially on benchmark-relative split or walk-forward evidence.

bootstrap.objective: Run one slower absolute-trend confirmation branch on the broad universe and decide whether a more patient SMA-cross family deserves promotion-path follow-up or retirement.
bootstrap.branch_rationale: The fast SMA-cross reentry branch retired, but that does not settle whether slower absolute-trend confirmation can reduce benchmark-relative fragility. This branch keeps the same engine while materially changing the evidence shape.
positive_hypotheses: Slower confirmation can reduce false-positive reentries that likely hurt the earlier SMA-cross branch.
A smaller basket with longer holding periods can preserve trend exposure while improving split stability.

seed_stack.label: Retired SMA-cross control
seed_stack.rationale: Reference control for the retired faster SMA-cross family.

seed_stack.label: SMA-cross confirmation seed
seed_stack.rationale: Repo-backed slower confirmation branch using the existing SMA-cross strategy with a more selective evidence profile.

campaign_path.label: SMA-Cross Confirmation Seed
campaign_path.purpose: Execute the slower absolute-trend confirmation family and decide whether it should be promoted or retired.
